# NH Jet Fun

> NH Jet Fun rents like-new Sea-Doo personal watercraft (jet skis) and delivers them to lakes across central and southern New Hampshire — from the Massachusetts border north to Squam Lake. Based in Hampstead, NH.

NH Jet Fun is a jet ski rental and delivery service in New Hampshire. We deliver fully-fueled Sea-Doos with USCG-approved life jackets and an in-person safety walkthrough, then pick them up at the end of the rental — no tow vehicle, trailer permits, or boat ramp required. All rentals are governed by New Hampshire law, backed by a signed rental agreement, and insured.

## Fleet
- Sea-Doo Wake 155 (Craft SK-01): wake & tow sport model, 155 HP Rotax engine, seats 3 riders, like-new condition. Rate: about $1,250 per week. NH registration NH 2636 KX.
- Sea-Doo GTR 230 (Craft SK-02): performance model, seats 3 riders, like-new condition. Rate: about $1,950 per week. NH registration NH 2539 PK.

## Service area — lakes and ponds served
We deliver south of Squam Lake. We do NOT service lakes north of Squam Lake.

Primary lakes served:
- Lake Winnipesaukee
- Squam Lake (northern edge of our service area)
- Newfound Lake
- Winnisquam Lake
- Northwood Lake
- Pleasant Lake
- Angle Pond
- Arlington Mill Reservoir
- Big Island Pond
- Canobie Lake
- Cobbetts Pond

Additional southern New Hampshire waters served on request (just ask when booking):
- Country Pond (Kingston / Newton)
- Great Pond (Kingston)
- Pawtuckaway Lake (Nottingham)
- and many other southern NH lakes and ponds

Note: New Hampshire law (RSA 270:74) prohibits jet skis ("skicraft") on public waters smaller than 75 acres, and some lakes carry local horsepower or PWC restrictions. We confirm the specific lake when a rental is reserved.

## Requirements
- Operators 16 and older must hold a valid New Hampshire Safe Boater Education Certificate to operate a personal watercraft (jet ski) or motorboat over 25 horsepower. This applies to every jet ski operator; an approved online course can be completed in an afternoon and a temporary certificate is available for visitors.
- The primary renter must be at least 21 (photo ID verified at delivery). Operators aged 16-17 must be supervised by an adult 21 or older.
- A signed rental agreement is required before delivery.

## Guides (long-form reference)
- Complete jet ski rental guide (how delivery works, costs, season, lakes, choosing a Sea-Doo): https://nhjetfun.com/guide.html
- New Hampshire boating license guide (who needs a certificate, age rules, approved courses): https://nhjetfun.com/boating-license.html
- Sea-Doo riding tutorial for first-time users (keys and kill switch, steering, the 150-foot rule, shallow-water/impeller care, reading buoys, daylight-only operation, and towing rules): https://nhjetfun.com/tutorial.html
- Boat vs. jet ski comparison for New Hampshire lakes (cost, maneuverability, storage, beaching, mooring, fishing, and trade-offs): https://nhjetfun.com/boat-vs-jet-ski.html

## Booking and contact
- Book online: https://bookings.nhjetfun.com
- Email: bookings@nhjetfun.com
- Location: Hampstead, New Hampshire, USA
